given: The S3 down migration has been executed and stock table is in rollback state
when: We inspect the stock table schema
then: The batch_number and serial_number columns are removed
architectural_notes: Infra: a contract on the stock data-store shape after rollback (the Alembic down migration drops batch_number and serial_number columns to fully restore the pre-split schema), proven by a parent-aware schema diff against the paired Lakebase branch. Owner: the Alembic revision in the repository/migration layer. Cross-cutting concern: reversibility (R4), the down path must fully restore the original schema.

independence.rationale: AC1-4 test the inventory_code column lifecycle and content; AC5 tests that down migration completes by removing split columns
